nameMeanings.name: VON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Berchta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Besta
meanings: Late Latin feminine form of Beatus ‘blessed’. The name was borne by an early Christian saint martyred in North Africa. Beata is widely used among Roman Catholics in Germany, Poland, and elsewhere; it is less common in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Berchta VON EBERSTALL was born as the daughter of Bruno VON EBERSTALL. She had at least 1 son with Konrad I. VON KIRCHBERG.
